productDisplayName: Gas Men Eldorado Tan Casual  Sandals
description: Perfect for those casual outings, these 100% leather sandals from gas are all that you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Designed for the man who wants to look stylish even when wearing casual sandals. Upper Leather strap over midfoot with buckle decoration Leather straps at forefoot with toe separator for great fitting comfort Midsole Leather midsole for enhanced durability and comfort Outsole Heavy duty leather outsole with a slightly elevated heel shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
